title: Chapter Structural Record
description: Per-chapter structural metadata the structure engine analyzes for read-pull and anti-shrink signals: pacing, chapter shape, tension position, world expansion, growth budget, side-thread touch. Production metadata, not canon — distinct from events.

tension.description: 1-5 escalation proxy; may be derived from position_in_flow.

world_expansion.description: Does this chapter widen the world?

protagonist_growth.description: Does the protagonist gain power/rank this chapter?

offscreen_pressure.description: Do off-screen actors move this chapter?
